title: abutilon angulatum
intro: Abutilon angulatum, also known as Indian mallow, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. Traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Abutilon angulatum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
